ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْمُدَّثِّرُ ١
ayahs.translation: O you who covers himself [with a garment],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قُمْ فَأَنذِرْ ٢
ayahs.translation: Arise and warn.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَرَبَّكَ فَكَبِّرْ ٣
ayahs.translation: And your Lord glorify.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَثِيَابَكَ فَطَهِّرْ ٤
ayahs.translation: And your clothing purify.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلرُّجْزَ فَٱهْجُرْ ٥
ayahs.translation: And uncleanliness avoid.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَا تَمْنُن تَسْتَكْثِرُ ٦
ayahs.translation: And do not confer favor to acquire more.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلِرَبِّكَ فَٱصْبِرْ ٧
ayahs.translation: But for your Lord be patient.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَإِذَا نُقِرَ فِى ٱلنَّاقُورِ ٨
ayahs.translation: And when the trumpet is blown,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَذَٲلِكَ يَوْمَئِذٍ يَوْمٌ عَسِيرٌ ٩
ayahs.translation: That Day will be a difficult day

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَى ٱلْكَـٰفِرِينَ غَيْرُ يَسِيرٍ ١٠
ayahs.translation: For the disbelievers - not easy.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ذَرْنِى وَمَنْ خَلَقْتُ وَحِيدًا ١١
ayahs.translation: Leave Me with the one I created alone

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَجَعَلْتُ لَهُۥ مَالاً مَّمْدُودًا ١٢
ayahs.translation: And to whom I granted extensive wealth

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَبَنِينَ شُهُودًا ١٣
ayahs.translation: And children present [with him]

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَهَّدتُّ لَهُۥ تَمْهِيدًا ١٤
ayahs.translation: And spread [everything] before him, easing [his life].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ يَطْمَعُ أَنْ أَزِيدَ ١٥
ayahs.translation: Then he desires that I should add more.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ‌ۖ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ لِأَيَـٰتِنَا عَنِيدًا ١٦
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, he has been toward Our verses obstinate.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَأُرْهِقُهُۥ صَعُودًا ١٧
ayahs.translation: I will cover him with arduous torment.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهُۥ فَكَّرَ وَقَدَّرَ ١٨
ayahs.translation: Indeed, he thought and deliberated.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ ١٩
ayahs.translation: So may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ قُتِلَ كَيْفَ قَدَّرَ ٢٠
ayahs.translation: Then may he be destroyed [for] how he deliberated.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ ٢١
ayahs.translation: Then he considered [again];

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ عَبَسَ وَبَسَرَ ٢٢
ayahs.translation: Then he frowned and scowled;

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: ثُمَّ أَدْبَرَ وَٱسْتَكْبَرَ ٢٣
ayahs.translation: Then he turned back and was arrogant

ayahs.textUthmani: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَقَالَ إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا سِحْرٌ يُؤْثَرُ ٢٤
ayahs.textIndopak: فَقَالَ اِنۡ هٰذَاۤ اِلَّا سِحۡرٌ يُّؤۡثَرُۙ‏
ayahs.translation: And said, "This is not but magic imitated [from others].
ayahs.transliteration: Faqaala in haazaaa illaa sihruny yu'sar

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنْ هَـٰذَآ إِلَّا قَوْلُ ٱلْبَشَرِ ٢٥
ayahs.translation: This is not but the word of a human being."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: سَأُصْلِيهِ سَقَرَ ٢٦
ayahs.translation: I will drive him into Saqar.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَآ أَدْرَٮٰكَ مَا سَقَرُ ٢٧
ayahs.translation: And what can make you know what is Saqar?

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَا تُبْقِى وَلَا تَذَرُ ٢٨
ayahs.translation: It lets nothing remain and leaves nothing [unburned],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لَوَّاحَةٌ لِّلْبَشَرِ ٢٩
ayahs.translation: Altering [i.e., blackening] the skins.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَلَيْهَا تِسْعَةَ عَشَرَ ٣٠
ayahs.translation: Over it are nineteen [angels].

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓا۟ إِيمَـٰنًا ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُوا۟ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَـٰذَا مَثَلًا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا جَعَلْنَآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلنَّارِ إِلَّا مَلَـٰٓئِكَةً‌ۙ وَمَا جَعَلْنَا عِدَّتَهُمْ إِلَّا فِتْنَةً لِّلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ لِيَسْتَيْقِنَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَيَزْدَادَ ٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوٓاْ إِيمَـٰنًا‌ۙ وَلَا يَرْتَابَ ٱلَّذِينَ أُوتُواْ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَٱلْمُؤْمِنُونَ‌ۙ وَلِيَقُولَ ٱلَّذِينَ فِى قُلُوبِهِم مَّرَضٌ وَٱلْكَـٰفِرُونَ مَاذَآ أَرَادَ ٱللَّهُ بِهَـٰذَا مَثَلاً‌ۚ كَذَٲلِكَ يُضِلُّ ٱللَّهُ مَن يَشَآءُ وَيَهْدِى مَن يَشَآءُ‌ۚ وَمَا يَعْلَمُ جُنُودَ رَبِّكَ إِلَّا هُوَ‌ۚ وَمَا هِىَ إِلَّا ذِكْرَىٰ لِلْبَشَرِ ٣١
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا جَعَلۡنَاۤ اَصۡحٰبَ النَّارِ اِلَّا مَلٰٓٮِٕكَةً​ وَّمَا جَعَلۡنَا عِدَّتَهُمۡ اِلَّا فِتۡنَةً لِّلَّذِيۡنَ كَفَرُوۡا ۙ لِيَسۡتَيۡقِنَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡكِتٰبَ وَيَزۡدَادَ الَّذِيۡنَ اٰمَنُوۡۤا اِيۡمَانًا​ وَّلَا يَرۡتَابَ الَّذِيۡنَ اُوۡتُوا الۡكِتٰبَ وَالۡمُؤۡمِنُوۡنَ​ۙ وَلِيَقُوۡلَ الَّذِيۡنَ فِىۡ قُلُوۡبِهِمۡ مَّرَضٌ وَّالۡكٰفِرُوۡنَ مَاذَاۤ اَرَادَ اللّٰهُ بِهٰذَا مَثَلًا ​ؕ كَذٰلِكَ يُضِلُّ اللّٰهُ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ وَيَهۡدِىۡ مَنۡ يَّشَآءُ ​ؕ وَمَا يَعۡلَمُ جُنُوۡدَ رَبِّكَ اِلَّا هُوَ ​ؕ وَمَا هِىَ اِلَّا ذِكۡرٰى لِلۡبَشَرِ‏
ayahs.translation: And We have not made the keepers of the Fire except angels. And We have not made their number except as a trial for those who disbelieve - that those who were given the Scripture will be convinced and those who have believed will increase in faith and those who were given the Scripture and the believers will not doubt and that those in whose hearts is disease [i.e., hypocrisy] and the disbelievers will say, "What does Allāh intend by this as an example?" Thus does Allāh send astray whom He wills and guide whom He wills. And none knows the soldiers of your Lord except Him. And it [i.e., mention of the Fire] is not but a reminder to humanity.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa ja'alnaaa As-haaban naari illaa malaaa-'ikatanw Wa-maa ja'alnaa 'iddatahum illaa fitnatal lillazeena kafaroo liyastaiqinal lazeena ootul kitaaba Wa-yazdaadal lazeena aamanooo eemaananw Wa-laa yartaabal lazeena ootul kitaaba walmu'minoona Wa-liyaqoolal lazeena fee quloo-bihim maradunw walkaafiroona maazaaa araadal laahu bihaazaa masalaa; kazaalika yudillul laahu mai yashaaa'u Wa-yahdee mai yashaaa'; Wa-maa ya'lamu junooda rabbika illaa hoo; Wa-maa hiya illaa zikraa lil-bashar

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا وَٱلْقَمَرِ ٣٢
ayahs.translation: No! By the moon.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلَّيْلِ إِذْ أَدْبَرَ ٣٣
ayahs.translation: And [by] the night when it departs.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَٱلصُّبْحِ إِذَآ أَسْفَرَ ٣٤
ayahs.translation: And [by] the morning when it brightens,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِنَّهَا لَإِحْدَى ٱلْكُبَرِ ٣٥
ayahs.translation: Indeed, it [i.e., the Fire] is of the greatest [afflictions].

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: نَذِيرًا لِّلْبَشَرِ ٣٦
ayahs.translation: As a warning to humanity -

ayahs.textUthmani: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: لِمَن شَآءَ مِنكُمْ أَن يَتَقَدَّمَ أَوْ يَتَأَخَّرَ ٣٧
ayahs.textIndopak: لِمَنۡ شَآءَ مِنۡكُمۡ اَنۡ يَّتَقَدَّمَ اَوۡ يَتَاَخَّرَؕ‏
ayahs.translation: To whoever wills among you to proceed or stay behind.
ayahs.transliteration: Liman shaaa'a minkum any yataqaddama aw yata-akhkhar

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كُلُّ نَفْسِۭ بِمَا كَسَبَتْ رَهِينَةٌ ٣٨
ayahs.translation: Every soul, for what it has earned, will be retained.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: إِلَّآ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱلْيَمِينِ ٣٩
ayahs.translation: Except the companions of the right,.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ ٤٠
ayahs.translation: [Who will be] in gardens, questioning each other

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: عَنِ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ ٤١
ayahs.translation: About the criminals,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: مَا سَلَكَكُمْ فِى سَقَرَ ٤٢
ayahs.translation: [And asking them], "What put you into Saqar?"

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: قَالُواْ لَمْ نَكُ مِنَ ٱلْمُصَلِّينَ ٤٣
ayahs.translation: They will say, "We were not of those who prayed,

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَلَمْ نَكُ نُطْعِمُ ٱلْمِسْكِينَ ٤٤
ayahs.translation: Nor did we used to feed the poor.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُنَّا نَخُوضُ مَعَ ٱلْخَآئِضِينَ ٤٥
ayahs.translation: And we used to enter into vain discourse with those who engaged [in it],

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَكُنَّا نُكَذِّبُ بِيَوْمِ ٱلدِّينِ ٤٦
ayahs.translation: And we used to deny the Day of Recompense

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: حَتَّىٰٓ أَتَـٰنَا ٱلْيَقِينُ ٤٧
ayahs.translation: Until there came to us the certainty [i.e., death]."

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا تَنفَعُهُمْ شَفَـٰعَةُ ٱلشَّـٰفِعِينَ ٤٨
ayahs.translation: So there will not benefit them the intercession of [any] intercessors.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَا لَهُمْ عَنِ ٱلتَّذْكِرَةِ مُعْرِضِينَ ٤٩
ayahs.translation: Then what is [the matter] with them that they are, from the reminder, turning away.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَأَنَّهُمْ حُمُرٌ مُّسْتَنفِرَةٌ ٥٠
ayahs.translation: As if they were alarmed donkeys.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَرَّتْ مِن قَسْوَرَةِۭ ٥١
ayahs.translation: Fleeing from a lion?

ayahs.textUthmani: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: بَلْ يُرِيدُ كُلُّ ٱمْرِىٍٕ مِّنْهُمْ أَن يُؤْتَىٰ صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً ٥٢
ayahs.textIndopak: بَلۡ يُرِيۡدُ كُلُّ امۡرِىٴٍ مِّنۡهُمۡ اَنۡ يُّؤۡتٰى صُحُفًا مُّنَشَّرَةً ۙ‏ ﻿﻿
ayahs.translation: Rather, every person among them desires that he would be given scriptures spread about.
ayahs.transliteration: Bal yureedu kullum ri'im minhum any yu'taa suhufam munashsharah

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّا‌ۖ بَل لَّا يَخَافُونَ ٱلْأَخِرَةَ ٥٣
ayahs.translation: No! But they do not fear the Hereafter.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: كَلَّآ إِنَّهُۥ تَذْكِرَةٌ ٥٤
ayahs.translation: No! Indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a reminder.

ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: فَمَن شَآءَ ذَكَرَهُۥ ٥٥
ayahs.translation: Then whoever wills will remember it.

ayahs.textUthmani: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ
ayahs.textUthmaniTajweed: وَمَا يَذْكُرُونَ إِلَّآ أَن يَشَآءَ ٱللَّهُ‌ۚ هُوَ أَهْلُ ٱلتَّقْوَىٰ وَأَهْلُ ٱلْمَغْفِرَةِ ٥٦
ayahs.textIndopak: وَمَا يَذۡكُرُوۡنَ اِلَّاۤ اَنۡ يَّشَآءَ اللّٰهُ​ ؕ هُوَ اَهۡلُ التَّقۡوٰى وَاَهۡلُ الۡمَغۡفِرَةِ‏
ayahs.translation: And they will not remember except that Allāh wills. He is worthy of fear and adequate for [granting] forgiveness.
ayahs.transliteration: Wa-maa yazkuroona illaaa any yashaaa'al laah; Huwa ahlut taqwaa Wa-ahlul maghfirah
